channel.title: NYT > Technology
channel.description: Technology industry news, commentary, and analysis, with reporting on big tech, startups, and internet culture. The New York Times is a hub for conversation about news and ideas.

item.title: ‘The Daily’ and ‘The Opinions’: How A.I. Is Changing Loneliness and Taste
item.description: The story of a woman who let a robot into her home. Plus, a discussion about why Silicon Valley has taken such an interest in taste.
item.dc:creator: Rachel Abrams, Nadja Spiegelman, Olivia Natt, Alex Stern, Asthaa Chaturvedi, Vishakha Darbha, Marc Georges, Chris Haxel, Alyssa Moxley, Carole Sabouraud, Dan Powell, Elisheba Ittoop, Marion Lozano, Pat McCusker, Diane Wong, Isaac Jones and Aman Sahota

media:content.media:description: Jan Worrell and her ElliQ. Washington State’s health department provided it to her as part of a pilot program.
